title: PacBio Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
text: PacBio delivered Q4 2025 adjusted loss per share of 12 cents, topping the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 36.8%. Total revenues of $44.6 million, up 13.8% year-over-year, beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 9.4%. Q4 2025 revenue grew 14% year-over-year and 16% sequentially with non-GAAP gross margin of 40% compared to 31% for Q4 2024. Consumables revenue grew 15% year-over-year to $21.6 million while instrument revenue increased 11% to $5.7 million. PacBio emerged from a challenging 2025 with renewed growth momentum. Management highlighted record consumable revenue and over 100% year-over-year growth in shipments to clinically focused accounts as bright spots. Clinical shipments now represent a mid-teens percentage of total consumable shipments, doubling year-over-year. Full-year 2025 revenues were down year-over-year, though consumables represented a growing portion of the revenue mix and academic funding constraints and lower Vega instrument demand weighed on performance.
